tokens.purpose: design language source — colors, type, radius, spacing

components.downstreamRule: copy markup from preview/, link components.css; safe in any canvas size

icons.purpose: bundled icon set — 115 SVG assets + Lucide-style runtime sprite
icons.downstreamRule: USE THESE; DO NOT pull lucide CDN or generate your own SVGs. Two modes: (A) static for plain HTML/React with no recolor needs; (B) + icons.js for currentColor-recolorable inline sprite. On --bg-brand surfaces (e.g. .ds-btn--brand) MUST use the {name}.0c0c0d.svg dark variant.

uikit.downstreamRule: READ for structural reference (which components in which region); DO NOT copy .uikit-shell root container or its grid-template-columns. Strip outer shell, keep inner regions, write your own canvas-sized outer grid.

modeA_staticImg.useFor: static HTML, React without runtime icon lib, UIKit shells

modeB_inlineSprite.useFor: preview pages, anywhere CSS color: var(--icon-*) recoloring is needed

iconUsage.rule: Brand-green surface MUST use the .0c0c0d.svg dark variant; white stroke fails contrast on #32F08C.
iconUsage.colorRule: Icon colors MUST follow the CSS token spec — no raw hex/rgb/named colors. Mode B: parent's `color` must be a token (var(--icon-default|--icon-secondary|--icon-tertiary|--icon-onbrand|--status-*-default)), never `color: #D1D3DB`. Mode A: bundled tinted SVGs encode existing token values (0c0c0d ≡ --text-onbrand, 33c192 ≡ --status-success-default, d27e24 ≡ --status-alert-default, 387bff ≡ --status-primary-default, 32f08c ≡ --bg-brand, d1d3db ≡ --text-default). To introduce a new tint: add the token to colors_and_type.css FIRST, then export a sibling {name}.{hex}.svg whose stroke/fill matches that token's value. Never modify a shipped SVG's stroke=/fill= to an arbitrary color in-place.

buildSingleComponent.consume: copy markup from preview, link components.css + colors_and_type.css

buildFullPageCustomCanvas.consume: use ui_kits as STRUCTURAL REFERENCE only; copy inner region markup from preview; write your own outer grid sized for your real canvas (100vw / fit-content / auto-fit). DO NOT inherit .uikit-shell max-width:1184px.

uikitConstraints.warningForDownstream: ui_kits/* are SHOWCASES capped at 1184px per design-library-creator skill spec. They render with whitespace on canvases > 1184px. For real product pages, follow downstreamScenarios.buildFullPageCustomCanvas.

recommendedReadOrder: ui_kits/{type}/index.html (as structural reference, not copy source)
